title: Khaitan, LexCounsel act on Texmaco - Rail Vikas Nigam joint venture
description: Texmaco Rail & Engineering Limited has entered into a joint venture arrangement with Rail Vikas Nigam Limited, with Texmaco and RVNL holding a 49:51 stake respectively.Khaitan & Co acted as the legal counsel to Texmaco and advised and assisted them on structuring of the transaction and drafting, negotiation, finalisation and execution of definitive agreements relating to the transaction.The transaction team consisted of Shourya Sengupta (Partner), Supallab Chakraborty (Senior Associate)
